entry.title: New: CR 25-45 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending ADOPTION of Resolution 25-122, authorizing the acceptance of two parcels from First Hawaiian Bank, identified for Real Property Tax purposes as Tax Map Keys (2) 4-9-011:018 and 019, at Lāna‘i City, Hawai‘i, comprising 14,379 and 10,510 square feet, respectively.

Water and Infrastructure Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
